name: KUNKUNKUN
short_description: Singing, dancing, rapping, basketball! Goodbye, KUNKUN! And chickens! Alone, you go to an abandoned old school to investigate the vengeful spirit KUNKUNKUN and was pursued. How did he become a true MAN? !
detailed_description:
《KUNKUNKUN》Is a first person horror adventure puzzle game!
Super Super UPDATE!! KUNKUNKUN Upgraded to 2.5PROMAX version!!
Super Super UPDATE!! KUNKUNKUN Upgraded to 2.5PROMAX version!!
Super Super UPDATE!! KUNKUNKUN Upgraded to 2.5PROMAX version!!



Why are abandoned old schools so angry? What the hell happened here?
To investigate the spirit KUNKUNKUN, everything is waiting for you to discover for yourself.
Everything in the game has nothing to do with reality, and any resemblance is purely coincidental.
The game contains a variety of scare elements. If you lack courage, please turn off the lights!

What will I experience?


Yes, it's another horror story. On a strange night of thunder and lightning,
KUNKUNKUN is everything you need to know!
Two and a half years in the making!
Trying to give you two and a half hours of extraordinary experience!
And you, will be a real brave MAN!

What's the play of this game?


KUNKUNKUNIt's everything you need to know！！
KUNKUNKUNIt's everything you need to know！！
KUNKUNKUNIt's everything you need to know！！

TIPS

WASD：move
Shift：run
E：interact
Left mouse：Next sentence
Tips: Friends who cleared the customs before, the second time to play if encountered into the old school after entering the direct third chapter. Please select Exit from the game in Chapter 3, ESC, and then select Exit from the main screen. When you start the game again, you can clear the previously saved data.

About basketball, about chickens, about affection, about dreams!


This is a moving and scary story!
This is a little-known show!
It's been a bizarre journey!




*Everything in the game has nothing to do with reality, and any resemblance is purely coincidental.
The game contains a variety of scare elements. If you lack courage, please turn off the lights!
